pro_brother.version_description: Uploading as Guitar Pro 6 file, as this site has issues with Guitar Pro 7 and 8.

recommended.song_name: When You Walk In The Room

content:
Tired Of Toein' The Line: Rocky Burnette
#8 on BB Hot 100, #1 Australia, #3 S. Africa,
and #58 on UK Singles on EMI Records in 1980
(Rocky is the son of Rock and Roll Pioneer
 Johnny Burnette who had many hits during the early
 days of rock and Rockabilly.)


INTRO: [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


#1.
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, I'm......tired of toein' the line......don't[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
know why you wanna jump on me, baby, baby, baby, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
it's makin' me cry.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, I........I'm gonna find myself someone new, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
someone who will be true..I'm no more toein' the line.[/tab]


BRIDGE:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I know it's over, cause I see the signs.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Gbm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Don't let me waste your precious time.[/tab]


#2.
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, I'm......tired of toein' the line......if you [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
want to get rid of me, baby, baby, baby, you're doin' [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
fine.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, I'm........tired of toein' the line.......I'm gonna [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
put on my walkin' shoes and leave you far behind.[/tab]


BRIDGE:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
You're rollin' over and over, so divine..but you can't [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
fix this broken heart of mine.[/tab]
